name: 反差開場
description: 以女主被最親近的家人背叛、奪走身份並被置於死地作為開場，製造強烈的不公感和同情心，同時用「古代女神轉世」這一超自然設定瞬間翻轉觀眾預期——受害者不再弱小，而是即將覺醒的強者。這種「極度壓迫＋隱藏王牌」的組合讓觀眾立刻想看復仇展開。

examples.drama_title: Revenge of the Reborn Heiress: Disowned, I Awakened My Divine Power & Bankrupted My Family Overnight
examples.excerpt: Betrayed and left for dead by the cruel family who stole her identity, a powerful ancient goddess is reborn into the body of a wronged heiress.

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: You have never been on your own without me, without my family, without our money. How do you think you're going to survive? ... And best picture goes to Love Before Dawn.

examples.drama_title: [MULTI SUB]【完整版】| 前世侯府主母被女儿迫害惨死，重生后她杀伐果断只想复仇！#短剧全集 #最火短剧推荐 | 甜梦剧场
examples.excerpt: 小姐，你总算是苦尽甘来了，就算不是侯爷亲生的，现在也顺利的嫁入了国公府……因为今天，是我和小国公爷的大婚之日，不是你的

examples.drama_title: 被假死丈夫和養子聯手滅門？重生歸來她釘棺拒守寡，智鬥渣男復仇，竟陷先婚後愛！《錯嫁君》#重生 #短剧 #最火短剧推荐 #minidrama #古装
examples.excerpt: 翠兒，準備嫁衣。翠兒準備嫁衣，陪我一起迎接丈夫回家。／好消息應該很快就會來了。三、二、一。夫人，出事了。將軍被毒箭射中，不幸身亡。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: I am Brienne, the richest woman in the world, the daughter of the Duke of Septin, and the only heirs of the Targaryen family. 3 years ago, I ran away from home... I didn't want to scare him away, so I lied about who I was and pretended to be a delivery girl.

examples.drama_title: Part-time girl help CEO relax,he find she's pure,love deeply!
examples.excerpt: 標題 'Part-time girl help CEO relax' 直接點明身份反差；標籤 '#Cinderella #boss' 強化灰姑娘與霸總的經典對立設定

examples.drama_title: 现代妇产科医生车祸穿越化身古代万人嫌皇后，一心躺平不争宠任他翻牌，还励志把后宫养的子嗣满堂，不料冷情皇帝越发被她的大度逼疯，从无所谓到疯狂吃醋逼她侍寝，只想和她一人生孩子#短剧全集 #短剧
examples.excerpt: 三十二床真的不能順產，你都不知道，她那骨盆比我人生規劃都窄呢...什麼情況，ICU爆改橫店，氧氣罩爆改步搖啦，我這是穿越了

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: I am a dignified modern celebrity with assets exceeding $100 million. I've always been the one being served. If it weren't for the fact that when I traveled here, the original owner had already concealed her identity as a cortisan and signed up. Who would want to come to this place to serve others? I need to find a way to fail the selection and get out of here.

examples.drama_title: Transmigrated Into the Body of Unloved Princess,Using Modern Knowledge,She Ascends Throne.#cdrama

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Capital International School. How would a young lady like her appear in the train? / Although it is not as prosperous as capital city, it is quite nice here.

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Working as a janitor here is honestly way more interesting than being a prized employee at Shiang Nai International. / Stop pretending. Who needs your dirty money? I'm telling you, I'm a star employee at Shiang Nai International.

examples.drama_title: 【FULL】一場家族聯姻，他嚴肅古板，她乖巧內斂，人人都說他們是形婚，長久不了，可後來圈子裏瘋傳一張照片——冷傲矜貴的男人跪地為她換鞋提包，原來看似牢不可破的堅冰，早已被溫情悄然浸潤，佛子也會墜入愛河
